title: Sour Mediterranean Tapas
description: A unique fusion of sour and mediterranean flavors, perfect for a quick tapas snack.
instructions: Cut the crusty bread into small cubes.
In a large bowl, mix together the sour cream, feta cheese, chopped olives, artichoke hearts, and diced red chillies.
Add the fresh parsley to the bowl and mix well.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the mixture and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Squeeze the fresh lemon juice over the top of the bread cubes and toss to coat.
Serve the bread cubes with the sour cream and feta cheese mixture spooned over the top.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
